user.title: Goldair IR Fan
user.description: Choose the remote entity that will transmit IR signals to your Goldair fan.

data_description.remote_entity: The Home Assistant remote entity connected to your IR blaster (e.g. a Broadlink device).
data_description.ir_command_delay: Minimum pause between consecutive IR commands. Increase this if your fan misses commands.
data_description.power_monitor_entity: A sensor that reports the fan's power draw in watts. When set, the integration updates the Power override state based on the threshold below.
data_description.power_threshold: If the averaged power reads above this value Power override is set on; at or below it Power override is set off. Default is 10 W.
data_description.power_lag_seconds: How long to average power readings before applying threshold decisions. Default is 300 seconds (5 minutes).

data_description.ir_command_delay: Minimum pause between consecutive IR commands. Increase this if your fan misses commands.
data_description.power_monitor_entity: A sensor that reports the fan's power draw in watts. Leave blank to disable automatic Power override updates.
data_description.power_threshold: If the averaged power reads above this value Power override is set on; at or below it Power override is set off. Default is 10 W.
data_description.power_lag_seconds: How long to average power readings before applying threshold decisions. Default is 300 seconds (5 minutes).
